_comment: Frozen pre-tournament Elo ratings for all 48 World Cup 2026 teams, fetched from eloratings.net/World.tsv before the tournament began (2026-06-11). This is the SOLE starting point for ratings going forward - the pipeline applies results.json on top of these values via scripts/sim/eloUpdate.js (K=60, goal-difference weighted) to compute current ratings. No live fetch is used in normal runs, so double-counting against eloratings.nets own updates is structurally impossible. Periodically (e.g. after each round of group matches), run scripts/sim/compareToLive.js to fetch live eloratings.net values and confirm our baseline+adjustments are tracking closely - if they drift noticeably, it may be worth re-freezing this baseline.
